prompt: A sleek solarpunk-inspired trophy symbolizing software migration success: a brushed aluminum base supporting three ascending translucent glass layers labeled subtly as V2, an arrow, then V3 (no readable text, just etched numerals). Warm teal edge-lighting glows through the layers, and a small rocket silhouette rises along the side, hinting at progress and upgrades. Photorealistic 512×512 render on a tidy desk with faint circuitry patterns in the background, no logos or readable UI, and a celebratory yet minimal feel.
